html:
A Historic MoU Has Been Signed Between The Department of Science and Technology, Government of Gujarat and L&T Vyoma for Setting Up a 250 MW Green AI-ready Data Center Campus at Dholera SIR.

This Initiative is a Strong Step Towards Positioning Gujarat as a National Hub for AI… pic.twitter.com/0kCHIMsptH

— Arjun Modhwadia (@arjunmodhwadia) February 20, 2026
